summary: Iteration 43 - 21 Security Protections Complete. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 21 protection cards displayed with ATTIVA status, all management panels working, export buttons functional.

minor.issue: The regex pattern for allowed origins may not match the staging URL when Origin header is sent. Requests without Origin header work fine (API clients). The middleware correctly blocks invalid origins.
minor.priority: LOW - Works correctly for API clients and browser requests from allowed domains

backend_api: GET /api/security/status returns 21 protections all with status 'active'

GET /api/security/status has all 10 new protections (ip_whitelist, session_invalidation, suspicious_login, password_policy, csrf_protection, api_key_rotation, geo_ip_detection, honeypot, body_size_limit, siem_export)
GET /api/security/ip-whitelist returns whitelist config with admin token
POST /api/security/ip-whitelist updates whitelist and persists changes
GET /api/security/sessions returns active sessions list with cache_stats
DELETE /api/security/sessions/{session_id} handles invalid session IDs gracefully
GET /api/security/password-policy returns policy config with all fields
PUT /api/security/password-policy updates policy and persists changes
GET /api/security/api-keys returns API keys list with masked values
Security headers present on all API responses (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, HSTS, CSP, etc.)
Origin verification allows requests without Origin header (API clients)
frontend_ui: Page shows '21 protezioni anti-hacker attive' subtitle
Summary cards show: Protezioni (21/21), IP Bloccati, Login Falliti 24h, Utenti 2FA, Stato OK
All 21 protection cards displayed with 'ATTIVA' status badges
IP Whitelist button opens whitelist management panel
Whitelist panel shows checkbox for enabled/disabled, IP input field, save button
Sessions button opens sessions management panel
Sessions panel shows active sessions count and list
Categories properly grouped: AUTENTICAZIONE (6), RETE & TRASPORTO (7), CONTROLLO ACCESSO (2), PROTEZIONE DATI (1), MONITORAGGIO & ALERTING (4), DIFESA ATTIVA (1)
All 10 new protection cards found: ip_whitelist, session_invalidation, suspicious_login, password_policy, csrf_protection, api_key_rotation, geo_ip_detection, honeypot, body_size_limit, siem_export
Recent security events section shows login events with timestamps and IP addresses

critical_code_review_comments: security_status.py: Correctly returns all 21 protections with detailed stats and category grouping
security_advanced.py: All new endpoints (IP whitelist, sessions, password policy, API keys, SIEM export) working correctly
honeypot.py: Middleware correctly auto-bans IPs hitting honeypot paths
body_size_limit.py: Middleware correctly limits request body size (10MB standard, 50MB upload)
origin_verify.py: CSRF protection working - blocks invalid origins, allows API clients without Origin header
auth.py: Suspicious IP detection on login working - tracks known IPs per user
server.py: All 6 middleware properly registered in correct order
SecurityDashboardPage.js: All 21 protection cards with proper data-testid attributes, category grouping, management panels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified all 21 security protections. The /api/security/status endpoint returns all 21 protections with 'active' status. New endpoints tested: /api/security/ip-whitelist (GET/POST), /api/security/sessions (GET/DELETE), /api/security/password-policy (GET/PUT), /api/security/api-keys (GET), /api/security/suspicious-logins (GET), /api/security/export/audit-logs (GET with format=json/csv). All 6 middleware (SecurityHeaders, GlobalRateLimit, RequestTimeout, BodySizeLimit, OriginVerify, Honeypot, IPBlock) are registered and working. The frontend SecurityDashboardPage at /security-dashboard displays all 21 protection cards organized by categories with management panels for IP Whitelist and Sessions.

mocked_apis.note: All 21 security protections are real implementations, not mocked

ip_whitelist_endpoints.status: WORKING - returns and updates whitelist config

session_management_endpoints.status: WORKING - returns sessions list, terminates sessions

password_policy_endpoints.status: WORKING - returns and updates policy config

api_keys_endpoint.status: WORKING - returns masked API keys list

middleware.origin_verify: WORKING - blocks invalid origins on mutating requests

frontend_security_dashboard.status: WORKING - 21 protection cards, management panels, export buttons
